posts.title: Designing Reliable Digital Products for Rwanda
posts.excerpt: Lessons from building practical systems for schools, communities, and public services.
posts.content: Building software for real communities requires reliability, simplicity, and long-term maintainability. I focus on accessible interfaces, resilient backend design, and deployment practices that work in constrained environments.

posts.title: What I Learned from Building AI + Web Integrations
posts.excerpt: How I combine ML models and product UX to deliver features people can actually use.
posts.content: The best AI features are not just about model accuracy. They need clear user flows, feedback loops, and safe fallbacks. I design AI-powered tools with human-centered interactions first.

posts.title: From Prototype to Production: My Build Workflow
posts.excerpt: The architecture and release checklist I use to ship better software with confidence.
posts.content: My workflow emphasizes rapid prototyping, early user validation, and structured hardening before release. CI checks, clear environment setup, and incremental rollouts keep quality high while moving fast.
